fields.summary: configure parallel-tests for yarn-client and yarn-server-resourcemanager

issuetype.description: A new unit, integration or system test.
issuetype.name: Test

fields.description: Unit tests for yarn-client and yarn-server-resourcemanager take over an hour each.  The parallel-tests profile should be configured to reduce the execution time.

resolution.description: The problem described is an issue which will never be fixed.
resolution.name: Won't Fix

fields.summary: Get a daily QBT run for Windows

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A new unit, integration or system test.
issuetype.name: Test
